name: Medical Deception
description: Illness, treatment, or death is being faked or misrepresented.

name: Corporate Malfeasance
description: A company is hiding fraud, abuse, or internal wrongdoing.

name: Human Disappearance / Abduction
description: A person has gone missing or been taken under suspicious, unknown, or coercive circumstances.

name: School / Academy Scandal
description: Misconduct, cover-up, or abuse inside an educational institution.

name: Private Surveillance Job
description: A routine tailing assignment reveals something larger.

name: Cold Case Reopen
description: An old unsolved case is reopened with new leads.

name: Artifact Theft / Historical Mystery
description: A stolen object is tied to buried history or secrets.

name: High-Strangeness Containment
description: Investigators confront anomalous events with uncertain cause.

name: Insurance Fraud
description: A claim may be staged, inflated, or completely false.

name: Serial Arson Pattern
description: Multiple fires suggest a connected offender or motive.

name: Blackmail / Extortion
description: Someone is being threatened, coerced, or financially squeezed.

name: Political Corruption
description: Public power is being used for hidden gain or protection.

name: Cult / Coercive Group Escape
description: A closed group exerts control and someone is trying to get out.

name: Human Trafficking / Recruitment Ring
description: People are being lured, moved, or exploited through organized methods.

name: Witness Intimidation
description: Pressure or threats are being used to silence testimony.

name: Smuggling Network
description: Illegal goods or people are moving through a hidden route.

name: Identity Theft / Impersonation
description: Someone is using another person's name, status, or records.

name: False Imprisonment
description: A person is being unlawfully held, hidden, or confined.

name: Environmental Crime
description: Pollution, dumping, or ecological harm is being concealed.

name: Labor Camp / Forced Work Abuse
description: Workers are being trapped, exploited, or controlled.

name: Prison / Jailhouse Conspiracy
description: Hidden coordination, abuse, or corruption inside confinement systems.

name: Election Sabotage
description: An effort is underway to disrupt or manipulate an election process.

name: Charity Fraud
description: A supposed good cause is being used as a front for theft.

name: Tech Sabotage / Data Theft
description: Systems are being disrupted or sensitive information is being stolen.

name: Religious Institution Cover-Up
description: Abuse, secrecy, or misconduct is being hidden inside a faith institution.

name: Financial Elder Abuse
description: An older person is being manipulated or drained for money.

name: Murder-for-Hire Setup
description: A killing is planned, outsourced, or framed through intermediaries.

name: Internal Affairs / Dirty Cop Case
description: Misconduct inside law enforcement is under investigation.

name: Gang Feud Spillover
description: A conflict between groups spills into civilians or connected targets.

name: Biohazard Leak / Suppressed Exposure
description: Dangerous exposure occurs and someone tries to bury it.

name: Deepfake / Reputation Destruction
description: Fabricated media is used to ruin credibility or cause harm.

name: Inheritance Manipulation
description: Someone is steering money, wills, or family control through deception.

name: Disaster Aftermath Looting / Missing Persons
description: Chaos after a disaster hides theft, disappearance, or both.

name: Ritual Panic / False Occult Narrative
description: Fear of the occult is being used to mislead or cover reality.
